items.quote: SafetyLink transformed our compliance program. The legal defensibility gives us confidence that we're truly protected.
items.name: Maria Rodriguez

items.quote: SafetyLink's bilingual platform made training our diverse workforce seamless.
items.name: Ana Gutierrez

items.quote: SafetyLink streamlined our entire safety program with measurable results.
items.name: David Kim

items.a: We combine OSHA-authorized consulting, powerful software, and built-in bilingual support. End-to-end solutions, not just audits.

items.q: Do I need to purchase software?
items.a: No — flexible models include standalone consulting, program management, or software. You can start with a one-time audit.

items.q: Is it suitable for small businesses?
items.a: Yes — we specialize in SMBs, offering enterprise-level expertise at affordable prices. Scalable from 10 to 10,000+ workers.

items.q: How quickly can we become compliant?
items.a: From the moment we engage, we move. Immediate boots-on-the-ground support to fix high-risk issues, deliver training, and install controls.
Built into all services — Spanish/English materials, signage, and direct workforce communication.

hero.title: The Experts Behind the Only Legally Defensible Safety Platform
hero.subtitle: Led by former OSHA leadership and backed by top labor law experts, SafetyLink delivers compliance solutions you can trust with confidence.

founded.heading: Founded by Safety Leaders, Guided by OSHA Experts
founded.text: With over two decades of safety leadership experience, SafetyLink was founded with a bold mission: to close the gap between regulatory compliance and real-world workplace protection. Built on a vision of legally defensible safety solutions, SafetyLink is transforming how organizations approach OSHA compliance.
founded.advisory_highlight: Our advisory board includes Edwin Foulke Jr., former Assistant Secretary of Labor for OSHA, and Bert Brennan, renowned labor law expert. Their combined 60+ years of OSHA leadership ensures our platform meets the highest standards of regulatory compliance.
founded.difference: Unlike generic safety software, SafetyLink combines OSHA-authorized expertise with cutting-edge technology. Our legally defensible platform provides bilingual support and industry-specific solutions backed by decades of regulatory leadership.

mission_vision.heading: Our Mission & Vision
mission_vision.subheading: Driving the future of workplace safety through expert-led compliance solutions

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To protect workers and businesses by delivering legally defensible, OSHA-authorized compliance solutions that go beyond check-the-box requirements to create genuinely safe workplaces.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To transform safety compliance from a burden into confidence, empowering organizations across every industry to protect their workforce with solutions they can trust completely.

values.heading: Our Core Values
values.subheading: The principles that guide everything we do at SafetyLink

items.title: Integrity & Trust
items.desc: We build solutions with unwavering integrity, ensuring every compliance tool and program we deliver can be trusted completely.

items.title: Worker Protection First
items.desc: Every decision we make prioritizes the safety and wellbeing of workers, because protecting people is our highest responsibility.

items.title: Compliance Through Expertise
items.desc: Our OSHA-authorized leadership ensures that every solution we provide meets the highest standards of regulatory compliance.

items.title: Innovation in Training & Technology
items.desc: We continuously innovate to make safety training more effective, accessible, and engaging for diverse workforces.

board.heading: Advisory Board
board.subheading: Industry leaders and regulatory experts who guide SafetyLink's mission

members.name: Edwin Foulke Jr.
members.role: Former Assistant Secretary of Labor for OSHA
members.bio: Edwin served as the Assistant Secretary of Labor for OSHA under President George W. Bush. His extensive experience in workplace safety regulation and enforcement brings unparalleled expertise to SafetyLink's compliance solutions.

members.name: Bert Brennan
members.bio: A renowned labor law expert with over 30 years of experience representing employers in OSHA matters. Bert's deep understanding of regulatory compliance helps ensure SafetyLink's legal defensibility.

members.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
members.bio: Leading occupational health researcher with expertise in workplace safety metrics and injury prevention. Her insights drive SafetyLink's evidence-based approach to safety program development.

members.name: Michael Rodriguez
members.bio: Former CTO of leading safety technology companies with expertise in compliance software and training platforms. Michael guides SafetyLink's technological innovation and user experience.
